limits.consistency: eventually consistent — newly created/updated records may take seconds to minutes to appear
limits.workaround: For immediate reads after writes, use batch/read or GET /crm/v3/objects/{type}/{id}

searchAPI.filterLogic: Filters within a filterGroup are AND. Multiple filterGroups are OR.
searchAPI.paginationNote: Cursor-based. Read paging.next.after from response. Absent = no more pages.
searchAPI.beyond10kRecords: Segment queries using non-overlapping createdate or hs_object_id ranges

batchAPI.upsertNote: Uses idProperty (e.g., 'email' or custom unique property). Creates if not found, updates if found.
batchAPI.idempotency: Include objectWriteTraceId per input for idempotent creates. Enables 207 multi-status responses.
batchAPI.multiStatus207: Batch operations may return 207 with mixed success/failure per item

rateLimits.batch: 100 items per request (CRM objects), 2000 for associations
rateLimits.retryHeader: Retry-After (seconds for HTTP, milliseconds for workflow webhooks)

propertyValueFormats.date: UNIX epoch ms (midnight UTC) or YYYY-MM-DD
propertyValueFormats.number: Numeric digits, at most one decimal

commonErrors.400: Bad request — invalid field, missing required, wrong format. Codes: VALIDATION_ERROR, PROPERTY_DOESNT_EXIST, INVALID_INTEGER, REQUIRED_PROPERTY
commonErrors.404: Not found — wrong ID or object type
commonErrors.414: URI too long — request too large or merge limit exceeded (250+)
commonErrors.423: Locked — high-volume data sync in progress. Retry with 2-second delay
commonErrors.429: Rate limited — honor Retry-After header. Check policyName for DAILY vs burst
commonErrors.477: Migration — data center migration in progress. Uses Retry-After
commonErrors.502: Gateway timeout — processing limits; pause and retry
